calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-20-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Cui Ling Wu.
Dept: 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings reported by Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Kevin Buiza, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.
No appearance by defendant Cui Ling Wu.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts was filed on January 24, 2020.
Defendant Cui Ling Wu's Answer to the complaint was filed on March 1, 2021.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on the parties on April 22, 2021, setting trial from September 7, 2021. Matter was assigned to Department 514 on September 13, 2021 for Short Cause Trial/Prove-Up Hearing and continued to today, September 20, 2021.
CCP Section 98 Declaration of Sherri Griffin was served on July 19, 2021. The exhibits attached to said declaration are admitted into evidence by the Court today, September 20th.
Order Deeming Request for Admissions, Admitted was filed on August 3, 2021, which the Court takes Judicial Notice of today, September 20th.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief was filed on August 31, 2021.
Plaintiff's Trial Exhibit List was filed on September 13, 2021.
No DOE defendants were named in plaintiff's complaint.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., and against defendant Cui Ling Wu, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $7,782.13 = Amount pled in the complaint.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $350.00.
Total - $8,132.13.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review signature.

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-13-2021 Continued To Sep-20-21 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 514

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-07-2021 Assigned To Trial Court

Motion For Order Deeming Rfas Admitted
Off Calendar Aug-02-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion For Order Deeming RFAs Admitted.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

No opposition filed. Motion granted. The truth of the facts specified in the Requests for Admission will be deemed admitted and Attachment 2 deemed genuine unless responses are served at or before the hearing on this matter.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at davididaho14@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
